title: Martin N. W. | Statistician & Mathematics Tutor

yaml.title: Martin N. W. | Statistician & Mathematics Tutor
yaml.subtitle: Data Analyst • Clinical Trials Researcher • Statistical Consultant

markdown.markdown: Hello and welcome! I am **Martin N. W.**, a passionate **Statistician, Data Analyst, Researcher, and Mathematics Tutor** with over **five years of experience** in statistical analysis, clinical trials research, data management, and quantitative research. I specialize in transforming complex data into meaningful insights that support evidence-based decision-making in research, healthcare, education, and business. --- # About Me I hold a strong background in **Medical Statistics** with extensive experience in: - Clinical trials and health research - Statistical modeling and data analysis - Research methodology and biostatistics - Data management and quality assurance - Academic writing and technical reporting - Mathematics and statistics tutoring I am passionate about helping researchers, students, and organizations solve real-world problems using data-driven approaches. --- # What I Do ## 📊 Statistical Analysis & Research I provide professional support in: - Data cleaning and management - Descriptive and inferential statistics - Regression modeling - Epidemiological analysis - Clinical trial data analysis - Survey and questionnaire analysis - Research proposal development - Thesis and dissertation support --- ## 📚 Mathematics & Statistics Tutoring I am also an experienced **Mathematics and Statistics Tutor**, helping students understand concepts clearly and improve their academic performance. ### Areas I Teach - Basic Mathematics - Algebra & Calculus - Probability & Statistics - Biostatistics - Research Methods - Data Analysis using R & Python --- # Technical Skills ## Programming & Data Tools - **R Programming** - Statistical modeling - Data visualization - Reproducible research - **Python** - Data analysis - Machine learning - Automation - **Excel** - Advanced formulas - Dashboards - Data management --- ## Documentation & Publishing - **Quarto** - Dynamic reports - Books and websites - Interactive dashboards - **LaTeX** - Academic publishing - Professional reports - Scientific documentation - **Git & GitHub** - Version control - Collaborative research - Project management --- # Professional Interests My professional interests include: - Clinical trials research - Mathematical epidemiology - Public health analytics - Statistical consulting - Educational technology - Reproducible research --- # Teaching Profiles ## TeacherOn --- ## Preply Tutor Profile 📘 View My Preply Tutor Profile --- # Contact Me I am open to: - Research collaborations - Statistical consulting - Data analysis projects - Mathematics and statistics tutoring - Academic writing support 📧 **Email:** --- # Let’s Work Together Whether you need support in research, data analysis, statistical modeling, or tutoring, I would be happy to collaborate with you. Thank you for visiting my portfolio.
